name: Post-Commit Test Generation with Auto-Ask
description: Detects code changes and asks permission to auto-generate Playwright tests

hooks.prompt: A git commit was just made in the EZTest project. Check if .claude/commit_analysis.json exists and read it. If it shows test opportunities (hasTestOpportunities is true), analyze what changed and ask the user: 'I detected code changes that need test coverage. Would you like me to generate Playwright tests for the following changes: [list the specific API routes, components, or features changed]? This will create tests in automation/tests/'. If user approves, generate comprehensive E2E tests that match the code changes detected. Use the diff in .claude/last_commit_diff.txt to understand what was changed.
